questions.question: Let G and H be two connected graphs with the same number of vertices. If G has a path from vertex u to vertex v and H has a path from vertex x to vertex y, show that G and H are isomorphic.
questions.hint: Use the properties of isomorphic graphs

questions.question: In the graph shown below, find all the sub-graphs of G that contain exactly two vertices.
Consider the following graph. Find the number of connected components in the graph.
questions.hint: Use the definition of connected components
